system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet2_group","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_DONDATHANG_CHITIET2_GROUP]
(
	@dondathang nvarchar(50),
	@nguoitao nvarchar(50),
	@ngaytao datetime,
	@nguoisua nvarchar(50),
	@ngaysua datetime
)
AS
BEGIN
	DECLARE @maddh NVARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @id_maddhmaddh NVARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @masp NVARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @chitiet NVARCHAR(200)
	DECLARE @tenchitiet NVARCHAR(MAX)
	DECLARE @dvt NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @dongia DECIMAL(18, 3)
	DECLARE @loaitien NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @ngaycangiao DATE
	DECLARE @fsc_id INT
	DECLARE @soluong DECIMAL(18, 3)
	DECLARE @sl_danhan DECIMAL(18, 3)
	DECLARE @sl_conlai DECIMAL(18, 3)
	DECLARE @ghichu NVARCHAR(MAX)
	DECLARE @donhang NVARCHAR(MAX)
	DECLARE @idChiTiet2 nvarchar(max)
	DECLARE @dayy FLOAT, @rong FLOAT, @dai FLOAT, @dongia_m3 FLOAT
	DECLARE @nguyenlieu NVARCHAR(50)
	DECLARE @tygia decimal(18, 3);

	DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
		SELECT maddh, id_maddhmaddh, masp, chitiet, tenchitiet, dvt, dongia, loaitien,
			ngaycangiao, fsc_id,
			dayy, rong, dai, nguyenlieu, dongia_m3,
			SUM(soluong) AS soluong,
			SUM(sl_danhan) AS sl_danhan,
			SUM(sl_conlai) AS sl_conlai,
			STRING_AGG(ghichu, '; ') AS ghichu,
			STRING_AGG(donhang, ', ') AS donhang,
			STRING_AGG(id, ',') AS id,
			SUM(DISTINCT tygia) AS tygia
		FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet2
		WHERE maddh = @dondathang
		GROUP BY maddh, id_maddhmaddh, masp, chitiet, tenchitiet, dvt, dongia, loaitien, ngaycangiao, fsc_id, dayy, rong, dai, nguyenlieu, dongia_m3
		ORDER BY masp, chitiet
	OPEN CUR;
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @maddh, @id_maddhmaddh, @masp, @chitiet, @tenchitiet, @dvt, @dongia, @loaitien, @ngaycangiao, @fsc_id, @dayy, @rong, @dai, @nguyenlieu, @dongia_m3, @soluong, @sl_danhan, @sl_conlai, @ghichu, @donhang, @idChiTiet2, @tygia;
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO tr_dondathang_chitiet
		(
			maddh, masp, chitiet, tenchitiet, soluong, dvt, sl_danhan, sl_conlai, dongia, thanhtien, loaitien, 
			donhang, ghichu, active, id_maddhmaddh,
			dayy, rong, dai, nguyenlieu, dongia_m3,
			ngaycangiao, fsc_id, idChiTiet2,
			create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by,
			tygia
		)
		VALUES
		(
			@maddh, @masp, @chitiet, @tenchitiet, @soluong, @dvt, @sl_danhan, @sl_conlai, @dongia, @soluong * @dongia, @loaitien,
			@donhang, @ghichu, 1, @id_maddhmaddh, 
			@dayy, @rong, @dai, @nguyenlieu, @dongia_m3,
			@ngaycangiao, @fsc_id, @idChiTiet2,
			@ngaytao, @nguoitao, @ngaysua, @nguoisua,
			@tygia
		)

		UPDATE tr_dondathang_chitiet2
		SET idChiTiet2 = @idChiTiet2
		WHERE id IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@idChiTiet2, ','))

		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @maddh, @id_maddhmaddh, @masp, @chitiet, @tenchitiet, @dvt, @dongia, @loaitien, @ngaycangiao, @fsc_id, @dayy, @rong, @dai, @nguyenlieu, @dongia_m3, @soluong, @sl_danhan, @sl_conlai, @ghichu, @donhang, @idChiTiet2, @tygia;
	END
	CLOSE CUR;
	DEALLOCATE CUR;

END","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet2"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet2"],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by","writes-multi-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
